communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Government Records Access and Management Act, I hereby request the following records:

Public reports show that this school district has been subject to book and curriculum challenges:

https://www.inquirer.com/education/radnor-high-school-book-ban-20250304.html

Therefore, I request the following:

Copies of all communications, including but not limited to: emails, texts, AI chatlogs, Microsoft Teams conversations, and any other electronic or digitally-based communications on all DSD communication platforms, related to inputting book ratings into Destiny Follett, including but not limited to communications with or about Brooke Stephens. 

Any materials provided by Brooke Stephens to DSD about training librarians on how to input book ratings into Destiny. 

1. Copies of all communications—including but not limited to emails, text messages, AI chatlogs, and Microsoft Teams conversations—on all District communication platforms related to the inputting of book ratings into the Destiny Follett system. This request specifically includes all such communications sent to, received from, or referencing Brooke Stephens.

2. Copies of any and all materials, guides, or instructional documents provided by Brooke Stephens to the District regarding the training of librarians or staff on the process of inputting book ratings into Destiny Follett.

3. Any records or internal correspondence indicating whether data derived from Destiny Follett was utilized by Brooke Stephens to create the aforementioned training materials.

4. All system logs, audit trails, or internal reports detailing the specific data accessed, exported, printed, or copied by Brooke Stephens. This includes any formal requests or correspondence from the District to Ms. Stephens regarding the deletion of screenshots, videos, notes, or other unauthorized data.

5. Technical records or IP logs indicating the duration and physical location of system access associated with the credentials used by Brooke Stephens, specifically identifying if access occurred at Reading Elementary or via remote/residential networks.

6. All internal incident reports or communications detailing when the District first became aware of potential unauthorized system access or data breaches involving these credentials, and the subsequent timeline of the District’s response.

Please perform this search for records between Jan 1, 2026 and the time this request is processed. This request is not for commercial purposes and will be used in the course of reporting for 404 Media, an independent, journalist-owned news site (www.404media.co).

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Claire Woodcock
